query: DELETE FROM patient_invites WHERE patientId IN (SELECT id FROM patients WHERE firstName = 'Test' AND lastName = 'User'); DELETE FROM resource_shares WHERE patientId IN (SELECT id FROM patients WHERE firstName = 'Test' AND lastName = 'User'); DELETE FROM assignment_steps WHERE assignmentId IN (SELECT id FROM protocol_assignments WHERE patientId IN (SELECT id FROM patients WHERE firstName = 'Test' AND lastName = 'User')); DELETE FROM task_completions WHERE assignmentId IN (SELECT id FROM protocol_assignments WHERE patientId IN (SELECT id FROM patients WHERE firstName = 'Test' AND lastName = 'User'));
